channel.title: resources on Xiao.chen
channel.description: Recent content in resources on Xiao.chen

item.title: Awesome blog's resoures
item.description: There are often some excellent blogs and open source website learning resources that need to be recorded Also for better sharing and dissemination, so the total continues below. The develop skill knowledge https://www.baeldung.com/linux/ (linux,java,spring) https://www.howtogeek.com/(it news, product) https://brendanthompson.com/posts(terraform, Articles about Cloud Engineering, and Golang) https://learnk8s.io/(Develop the knowledge and skills to get the most out of Kubernetes with hands-on online courses and instructor-led classes.) https://www.baeldung.com/linux/linux-scripting-series(Linux Scripting Series) https://www.grymoire.com/Unix/Sed.html(Sed - An Introduction and Tutorial by Bruce Barnett) https://jaminzhang.
